original_prompt: 帮我生成一栋美国现代城市独栋大楼上面有Jade Trau的字母，要求全景
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Wide panoramic shot. A sleek, standalone modern skyscraper in a bustling American metropolis (like NYC or Chicago). The building architecture is contemporary glass and steel, reflecting the golden hour sunlight. The structure stands distinctively against a skyline of other high-rises. The overall mood is high-end, corporate, and luxurious.

[Text & UI Layout]
On the upper facade of the building, the text "Jade Trau" is prominently mounted as a large-scale 3D building sign. The letters are "Jade Trau", rendered in the exact serif typeface of the visual fingerprint, but materialized as illuminated channel letters or polished metal signage. The font maintains its sharp serifs and high contrast between thick and thin strokes. No other text obscures the view.
layout_logic: Since the request is for a building sign, the text 'Jade Trau' should be placed near the top of the skyscraper (the 'crown' of the building) where logos are traditionally found. The perspective should be low-angle or eye-level from a distance to capture the full height of the building against the sky. The font must remain the classic serif style provided in the reference, but adapted to look like physical 3D signage.
